title: An Account of Active Inference Modeling
description: This report provides a single-page account of Active Inference modeling.  This report was written entirely by hand without any synthetic computational-linguistic intelligences. Thank you to the learners, interns, and participants of the Active Inference Institute to whom I've mostly learned from.
